issues.title: Low Resolution Exterior Photos
issues.description: 2 of 6 exterior photographs on pages 21-22 have resolution below the 300 DPI minimum required threshold.

issues.title: Incomplete Market Trend Data
issues.description: The market conditions table on page 10 is missing Q3 2024 data. All four quarters should be represented for a complete 12-month trend analysis.

issues.title: Methodology Section Incomplete
issues.description: The scope of work on page 31 does not describe the regression analysis methodology referenced in the GLA adjustment rationale on page 16.

issues.title: Comparable Photo Caption Mismatch
issues.description: The photo labeled 'Front Exterior — 509 Birch Lane' on page 26 appears to show the same property as the photo on page 24 labeled '118 Oak Avenue'.

issues.title: Site Improvement Cost Not Sourced
issues.description: The renovation cost estimates in the table on page 6 (totaling $78,700) are listed without attribution. Source should be noted (owner interview, receipts, etc).

issues.title: Exposure Time Justification Weak
issues.description: Exposure time estimate of 30-60 days on page 20 references average DOM of 45 days but doesn't account for the subject's specific characteristics or price point.

issues.title: Basement Finish Percentage Inconsistency
issues.description: Basement finish is reported as 65% on page 3 and page 6, but the improvement analysis on page 11 references 700 sq ft of 1,080 sq ft which is 64.8%.

issues.title: Missing Energy Efficiency Details
issues.description: The HVAC section notes a 96% AFUE furnace and 16 SEER A/C but the energy efficient items row in the sales comparison grid is marked 'Typical' without elaboration.

issues.title: Plat Map Scale Not Indicated
issues.description: The subdivision plat sketch on page 28 is labeled 'Not to Scale' but should include approximate dimensions for the surrounding lots for context.

issues.title: Active Listing Data Stale
issues.description: The active listings table on page 30 does not include a 'data as of' date. Active listing data should be dated within 7 days of the report date.

issues.title: Garage Dimensions Not Verified
issues.description: Garage described as 'approximately 22 x 24 feet' on page 5. The word 'approximately' suggests dimensions were estimated rather than measured.

issues.title: Missing Sprinkler System in Site Improvements
issues.description: The automatic sprinkler system mentioned on page 8 is not reflected in the site improvements cost table on page 6 or the depreciation schedule.

issues.title: Formatting: Inconsistent Currency Notation
issues.description: Some values use comma separators (e.g., $285,000) while others on page 12 omit them (e.g., $38500). Currency formatting should be consistent throughout.
